minor.name: Asymmetric Face
minor.description: The Character’s face is noticeably unbalanced, often by an inch or more.

minor.name: Balljoint Fingers
minor.description: The Character is able to bend all of their fingers perfectly backwards with no pain.

minor.name: Barrel Chest
minor.description: The Character’s chest is larger than normal, great for some, strange for others.

minor.name: Big Head
minor.description: The Character’s head is 50% larger than normal for their species.

minor.name: Big Snozz
minor.description: The Character’s nose is 50% larger than normal for their species.

minor.name: Colorblind
minor.description: The Character is completely colorblind, all colors to them are various greys.

minor.name: Completely Bald
minor.description: The Character has no hair, eyebrows, chitin bristles or any other kind of hair. Smooth.

minor.name: Deathly Pale
minor.description: The Character has the pallor of a corpse regardless of their Species.

minor.name: Distinctive Birthmark
minor.description: The Character has a large, distinctive, birthmark somewhere on their body.

minor.name: Double Jointed
minor.description: The Character is double jointed in their [D6: 1-3 Legs / 4-6 Arms]. Able to bend them in different angles than normal.

minor.name: Dumbo Ears
minor.description: The Character has ears or antennae that are 50 to 100% larger than normal for their Species.

minor.name: Enlarged Nethers
minor.description: The Character’s…nether regions are 50% larger than normal.

minor.name: Extra Teeth
minor.description: The Character has an extra 1d12 teeth in their mouth.

minor.name: Extra Toes
minor.description: The Character has 1d6 extra toes between both of their feet.

minor.name: Fewer Toes
minor.description: The Character does not have 1d6 toes between both of their feet.

minor.name: Flat Teeth
minor.description: The Character’s teeth are completely flat with no edges or canines.

minor.name: Herculean Chin
minor.description: The Character’s chin is quite impressive, some would say it would be handsome if it was so prominent.

minor.name: Heterochromia
minor.description: The Character’s eyes are two different colors - often radically different.

minor.name: Huge Guts
minor.description: The Character’s guts (lower and upper intestines) are larger than most, causing a bloated look in their lower torso.

minor.name: Hunched Spine
minor.description: The Character’s spine has a natural curve, making them appear hunched over at all times.

minor.name: Large Ears
minor.description: The Character’s ears are 50% larger than normal for their Species.

minor.name: Long Nose
minor.description: The Character’s nose is 50% longer than normal for their Species.

minor.name: Lucky Sixth Finger
minor.description: On the [D6: 1-3 Left / 4-6 Right] Hand, there is an additional finger that functions normally but does little else.

minor.name: Missized Arms
minor.description: The Character’s arms are two to four inches different in size.

minor.name: Missized Ears
minor.description: The Character’s ears are 50% larger and smaller than normal for their species, choose which ear is the large / small one.

minor.name: Oblong Legs
minor.description: The Character’s legs are 1d4 Inches different in height, looking like their limping on one leg normally.

minor.name: Overly Thick Hair
minor.description: The Character’s hair, or hair-like substance, is thick and difficult to cut in most circumstances.

minor.name: Patches
minor.description: The Character has patches of different colorations across their skin, easily covered by makeup but always present.

minor.name: Protruding Jaw
minor.description: The Character’s jaw juts forward, making them appear slackjawed should they not be focusing.

minor.name: Scleral Coloration
minor.description: The Character’s Scleral Coloration is different from normal. White is normal for humans and humanoids.

minor.name: Sharp Teeth
minor.description: The Character has no flat teeth, instead a full mouth of sharp incisors for cutting. Useless except for eating.

minor.name: Shrunken Nethers
minor.description: The Character’s nethers have been shrunk to half the normal size for their Species. Tragic.

minor.name: Skin Patches
minor.description: The Character has large discolorations on their body, making them appear as if they are two separate skin tones.

minor.name: Slobberful Tongue
minor.description: The Character’s tongue is large and often slides out if not paying attention, making them appear to be “Slobbering.”

minor.name: Small Head
minor.description: The Character’s head is 50% smaller than normal for their species.

minor.name: Small Snozz
minor.description: The Character’s nose is 50% smaller than normal for their species.

minor.name: Staggered Heartbeat
minor.description: The Character’s heart beats in a different rhythm from normal. Unnoticeable and untreatable.

minor.name: Strange Colored Eyes
minor.description: The Character’s eye color is an unnatural shade, often one that is uncomfortable to maintain eye contact with for long.

minor.name: Stretched Head
minor.description: The Character’s head is stretched out, making them appear to have a taller head than normal.

minor.name: Stretched Skin
minor.description: The Character’s skin didn’t grow and fold naturally, instead it appears poorly stretched over their muscles and may even tear if not careful.

minor.name: Stripes
minor.description: The Character has a set of “Stripes” on their body running either in rings or staggered lines. Often these are different shades of their skin tone but may be more exotic.

minor.name: Tailbone
minor.description: The Character has a vestigial tail (or second tail) growing near or around the spine. Often it is nipped in childhood, but the scars and bone may remain.

minor.name: Terrible Breath
minor.description: The Character’s breath is wretched, leaving others gagging if not adequately prepared.

minor.name: Terrible Stench
minor.description: The Character gives off a terrible odor, something about being unnatural and atrocious for their Species to be around.

minor.name: Two Foot
minor.description: The Character has two [D6: 1-3 Left / 4-6 Right] Feet instead of a Left and Right Foot.

minor.name: Uncomfortable Nails
minor.description: The Character’s nails are strange, either growing larger, not growing at all, or growing wrong to cause a vague discomfort if not clipped properly.

minor.name: Unlucky Four Fingers
minor.description: The Character doesn’t have a finger on their hands [1d10: 1-2 Thumb / 3-4 Index / 5-6 Middle / 7-8 Ring / 9-10 Pinkie]

minor.name: Veiny
minor.description: The Character has protruding veins of a strange color, difficult to view without bringing attention to it.

minor.name: Wheezing
minor.description: When breathing, the Character lets out a wheeze instead of silent breaths. They can control this, but it is “Natural” for them.

minor.name: Wyrd Lip Color
minor.description: The Character’s lips are a strange color naturally.

major.name: Albino
major.description: The Character is entirely pale as if the color had been drained from them, their eyes have a distinctive reddish-pink hue.

major.name: Big Sniffer
major.description: The Character’s nose is easily three times the size it should be.

major.name: Bizarre Coloration
major.description: The Character has a strange skin tone or appearance, often a brighter or strange color that draws the eye.

major.name: Black Blood
major.description: The Character’s blood is pitch black.

major.name: Bugged Out Eyes
major.description: The Character’s eyes are “bugged out” seeming to protrude from their head.

major.name: Burning Hot
major.description: The Character is really hot, as in they feel like they are feverish but are fine.

major.name: Cyclops
major.description: The Character has only one massive eye, often centrally located on their head.

major.name: Digitigrade
major.description: The Character’s legs are digitigrade, bent backwards at the kneecap.

major.name: Diurnal Vomiting
major.description: The Character must vent a buildup of fluids in their body by vomiting it out. Daily.

major.name: Elongated
major.description: The Character’s limbs are 1d4+1 Inches longer than normal.

major.name: Elven Features
major.description: The Character has faerie features, pointed face, slanted eyes appearing to be almost closed, and fair complexion. Often extremely thin and tall.

major.name: Evil Eye
major.description: The [D6: 1-3 Left / 4-6 Right] Eye is entirely black with the pupil being either Red, Orange, or Green. It twitches a lot.

major.name: Exotic Beauty
major.description: The Character has distinctive, noticeable, and “Attractive” Features taken up to 11.

major.name: Extra Mouth
major.description: The Character has an extra mouth located on their [D10: 1-2 Torso / 3-4 Arms / 5-6 Legs / 7-8 Back / 9-10 Head]. It cannot speak but is connected to the stomach.

major.name: Five Joint Fingers
major.description: The Character has five joints in each of their fingers, allowing for uncomfortable looking bending and twisting.

major.name: Flesh Crown
major.description: The Character has a series of protrusions on their forehead and around their cranium, appearing as if they have a “Flesh Crown.”

major.name: Freezing Cold
major.description: The Character feels terribly cold, as if they are suffering from hypothermia.

major.name: Goop Blood
major.description: The Character’s blood, once out of their body, is goopy - similar in feeling and appearance to gelatin.

major.name: Hair Everywhere
major.description: The Character grows hair everywhere, including where hair shouldn’t grow. Inside and out.

major.name: Hermaphrodite
major.description: The Character has sexual and physical characteristics for both male and female members of their Species.

major.name: Hooves
major.description: The Character’s feet bones have fused together to create a set of pseudo hooves instead of regular feet.

major.name: Hunchback
major.description: The Character has a sack of fat and muscle on their back, creating a hunchback look.

major.name: Leathery Skin
major.description: The Character’s skin is coarse and uncomfortable to touch.

major.name: Long Neck
major.description: The Character’s neck is twice as long as normal, standing tall among others.

major.name: Massive Head
major.description: The Character’s head is bulbous and twice the size as normal.

major.name: Misplaced Facial Features
major.description: The Character’s facial features, eyes, ears, nose, mouth, etc. - are jumbled up on their face, but still serve their purpose.

major.name: Mono Colored Eye
major.description: The Character’s eyes are a single, uncomfortable, color with no visible pupils.

major.name: New Ear
major.description: The Character has an ear growing on their [D10: 1-2 Torso / 3-4 Arms / 5-6 Legs / 7-8 Back / 9-10 Head]. It still functions.

major.name: Predator Teeth
major.description: The Character has two incisors sticking out of their jaw, appearing as tusks.

major.name: Primal Form
major.description: The Character looks “regressed” larger build with sloped features. Many would

major.name: Pulsating Veins
major.description: The Character’s veins can be seen visibly pumping blood through their body. Why is it a different color depending on the light?

major.name: Shark Teeth
major.description: The Character’s teeth are constantly growing, leading to many being popped out on a regular basis only to be replaced soon after.

major.name: Slimy
major.description: The Character is slimy. Literally. Gross.

major.name: Strange Voice
major.description: The Character’s vocal cords are wrong, giving them a [D10: 1-2 Higher Pitch / 3-4 Lower Pitch / 5-6 Husky / 7-8 Rattly / 9-10 Sing Song]

major.name: Third Eye
major.description: The Character has a useless third eye (including socket) on their [D10: 1-2 Torso / 3-4 Arms / 5-6 Legs / 7-8 Back / 9-10 Head]. It will twitch.

major.name: Three Fingered
major.description: The Character has three fingers (Index, Ring, and Thumb)

major.name: Two Tongues
major.description: The Character has two tongues in their mouth, stacked on top of one another.

major.name: Uncomfortably Tall
major.description: The Character is uncomfortably tall; they stand 50% taller than others of their Species.

major.name: Unfortunate Nose
major.description: The Character’s nose is…wrong, wrong in a variety of ways that is disturbing to look at but not strange enough to comment on.

major.name: Unnaturally Heavy
major.description: The Character is built heavy; they weigh 50% more than average for their species.

major.name: Unnaturally Light
major.description: The Character is light as a feather, for some reason, they weigh 50% less than average for their species.

major.name: Vestigial Horns
major.description: The Character has 1d4 Vestigial Horns growing from their head, they may, or may not, be poking out as bone protrusions.

major.name: Vestigial Wings
major.description: The Character has 1d4 Vestigial Wings growing out of their back, they cannot be used and are little more than flesh and bone.

major.name: Visible Organs
major.description: The Character’s skin is thin enough to see through, viewing their organs perform the essential functions for life.

major.name: Warped Nethers
major.description: The Character’s nethers are wrong. As in severely wrong. Horribly wrong.

major.name: Warts & Woggles
major.description: The Character suffers from the Warts and Woggles - sores that are painful to scratch and change place daily.

major.name: Webbed Digits
major.description: The Character has webbed toes and fingers; the thin membrane has nerves in it.

major.name: Wrong Ears
major.description: The Character’s ears are warped and incorrect, larger, smaller, colored wrong, or even just functionally useless.

major.name: Wrong Mouth
major.description: The Character’s mouth has been warped uncomfortably, larger than usual, circular, lipless, to other more terrible possibilities.

major.name: Critical Mutation
major.description: The Character increases their Mutation to a Critical Mutation.

severe.name: Ageusia
severe.description: The Character has no taste; they automatically fail any Taste Test.

severe.name: Anosmia
severe.description: The Character has no sense of smell; they automatically fail any Smell Test.

severe.name: Aquatic Adapted
severe.description: The Character is adapted to sea life; they are able to breathe underwater and have a Swim Speed equal to their Land Speed. However, on land, they have a -1 to their Land Speed due to their condition.

severe.name: Atrophy
severe.description: The Character’s [D10: 1-2 Right Arm / 3-4 Left Arm / 5-6 Right Leg / 7-8 Left Leg / 9- 10 Nethers] is completely useless and cannot be used.

severe.name: Blind
severe.description: The Character is functionally blind, they cannot see anything, fail any Sight test, have -5 Avoid, and -4D to all Attacks.

severe.name: Built Tough
severe.description: The Character is built tough and to endure, they increase their Base HP by +2.

severe.name: Chaos Organ
severe.description: A Character’s [D8: 1-2 Heart / 3-4 Lungs / 5-6 Intestines / 7-8 Kidney] is considered a Chaos Organ, which does everything the other Organs do and the rest are redundant.

severe.name: Chronic Obesity
severe.description: The Character is obese, with a -1 Presence and -1 Land Speed. On the other hand, people think they’re rich.

severe.name: Claws
severe.description: The Character has clawed appendages, imparting a -1d when using manual finger dexterity, but they have the [Mutant Claws] Weapon. [Unarmed / DMG 3 S or P / Crit 5 / One Hand / Melee / Unwieldy, Agile, Light]

severe.name: Cloven Hooves
severe.description: The Character’s bones in their foot have melded to create a cloven hoof instead of a foot, requiring regular maintenance to keep it working right. They can no longer buy normal boots but have the [Cloven Hoof] Weapon. [Unarmed / DMG 3 B / Crit 3 / No Hands / Melee / Unwieldy, Pounding]

severe.name: Deaf
severe.description: The Character is functionally deaf; they cannot hear and automatically fail any Hearing Test. [D6: 1 Learned in Sign Language / 2-6 Don’t Know Sign Language]

severe.name: Dozen Eyes
severe.description: The Character’s head is laced with several eyes facing in all directions. The Character has All Around Sight.

severe.name: Dwarf
severe.description: The Character has a version of dwarfism; they are considered one Size smaller than average for their Species.

severe.name: Endless Joints
severe.description: The Character has a number of joints in strange places; they may bend and twist themselves unnaturally - they gain +1d to all Contortion Checks.

severe.name: Environmental Failure
severe.description: The Character is adapted for a bubble. They have a Moderate Vulnerability to all Environmental Conditions and natural elements.

severe.name: Extra Arm
severe.description: The Character has an entirely new arm growing out of their body, it is treated as a regular arm that may carry things as they wish.

severe.name: Extra Brain
severe.description: The Character has a second, less useful, brain to help the mental load. Increase Grit by +1.

severe.name: Extra Leg
severe.description: The Character has a whole new leg growing somewhere it shouldn’t. [D6: 1-3 Unlucky Placement -1 Finesse / Lucky Legs +1 Finesse]

severe.name: False Mind
severe.description: The Character’s psychic imprint is so damaged, that whenever they are suffering a Meltdown, they also have the Mind Static Effect.

severe.name: Fermenta Gut
severe.description: If the Character eats natural plant based foods, they will produce one dose of alcohol in their gut and be under its effects.

severe.name: Ghoulish Appetite
severe.description: The Character can only eat raw flesh, anything else will be vomited out within the hour.

severe.name: Gliding Wings
severe.description: The Character has a set of wings that they may glide safely down from a great height but not fly with.

severe.name: Golden Digits
severe.description: The Character’s fingers and toes are golden, fetching 50 Serpents per cut off digit.

severe.name: Grotesque
severe.description: The Character is frankly hideous, absolutely ugly, atrociously ugly, children cry when they are seen and animals would rather flee than face you. -2d to all Social Interactions except [Intimidation].

severe.name: Hemophilia
severe.description: The Character is a bleeder - whenever they have the Bleed Condition, it is always one step worse than it was originally.

severe.name: Horns
severe.description: The Character has 1d4 Horns growing from their head, they may be used as impromptu weapons in duress. [Unarmed / DMG 2P / Crit 4 / No Hands / Melee / Unwieldy, Impaling]

severe.name: Hulking Brute
severe.description: The Character is massive for their Species; they increase their Size by one Step. Increase Physique by +1 and reduce Finesse by -1.

severe.name: Hypoesthesia
severe.description: The Character has no feeling of touch; they automatically fail any Touch Test. [D6: 1-4 No Analgesia / 5-6 Analgesia] If the Character also has Analgesia, they do not feel pain or register it as hurting them. They will still take damage and suffer the effects, just not feel it.

severe.name: Iron Skin
severe.description: The Character has rock solid skin; they have -1 Finesse but a Natural Deflection of 25 on all body parts.

severe.name: Mismanaged Guts
severe.description: The Character’s guts and body is so maligned that treatment is incredibly difficult, all Healing, Surgery, or Recovery Checks made for the Character is at -3d.

severe.name: Monkey Tail
severe.description: The Character has a tail; it may grip onto things as if their Physique was two (-2) less.

severe.name: Mute
severe.description: The Character is a functional mute, they cannot speak.

severe.name: Night’s Eye
severe.description: The Character can see in the dark as well as they can see during the day, but being in bright light causes a -1d on all Checks unless eye protection is used.

severe.name: Pindrop Ears
severe.description: The Character’s hearing is phenomenal; they gain a natural +1d on all Hearing related Checks. They hear most everything, loudly.

severe.name: Poisoner’s Tongue
severe.description: The Character’s taste is exquisite and precise; they gain a natural +1d on all Taste related Checks. Though they can only enjoy the most extreme tastes anymore.

severe.name: Precision Eyes
severe.description: The Character’s eyesight is amazing; they gain a natural +1d on all Sight related Checks. They are sensitive though.

severe.name: Pretty Tail
severe.description: The Character has a tail, a tantalizing thing that draws the eye with its unconscious movement, they gain +1 Presence.

severe.name: Redundant Organs
severe.description: The Character’s body is filled with redundant and often useless organs to soak blows. They gain +1 Resilience.

severe.name: Regenerative
severe.description: The Character has Regeneration 2.

severe.name: Reorganized Instinct
severe.description: The Character has +1d to their Initiative Check due to their heightened instincts, but them being on edge constantly tends to make focusing difficult.

severe.name: Sanguaphage
severe.description: The Character can drink blood for sustenance; it doesn’t taste good or provide any supernatural benefits.

severe.name: Serrated Teeth
severe.description: The Character has a row of serrated teeth for biting and tearing food and has torn their tongue multiple times. [Unarmed / DMG 3 P / Crit 3 / No Hands / Melee / Unwieldy, Ripping]

severe.name: Skin Pouches
severe.description: The Character has a set of skin pouches on their body, allowing them to hide small objects inside of them.

severe.name: Snout
severe.description: The Character’s nose is a distinctive snout. They are Learned in Smell.

severe.name: Tentacle Arms
severe.description: The Character’s [D6: 1-3 Right / 4-6 Left] Arm is a tentacle with suction cups, what freakish horror. It does grant a +1d to Climbing Checks.

severe.name: Toxic
severe.description: The Character is toxic, literally. If any part of them is consumed it will deliver a Fast 8D Toxicity [D6: 1-2 Cytotoxin / 3-4 Hemotoxin / 5-6 Neurotoxin] that forces the target to take 2d HP Damage every hour for 1d4 hours.

severe.name: Unnatural Appetite
severe.description: The Character’s body rejects most things they have a highly specialized diet that requires exact (often pricey) ingredients. Their body rejects all other kinds of food.

severe.name: Weakened Constitution
severe.description: The Character is susceptible to disease and other effects, they have -1 Resistance and treat all diseases / poisons as starting one interval sooner.

severe.name: Nothing?
severe.description: Nothing is wrong. Right? [D6: 1-5 Everything is Fine / 6 Roll a Critical Mutation]

severe.name: Increase to Critical
severe.description: The Character increases their Mutation to a Critical Mutation.

critical.name: A Pile of Meat
critical.description: The Character is little more than a pile of meat that prays for death. Make a new Character and pray they do not suffer the same fate.

critical.name: Aetheric Blood
critical.description: The Character’s Blood is a miraculous compound, being able to be synthesized into various medicines. If a vial is ingested, it heals 2 HP automatically. Cannot accept blood donations.

critical.name: Bad Blood
critical.description: The Character has bad blood, and any variety of medical treatments incur a -5d to attempt to cure. Blood transfusion is impossible both ways.

critical.name: Blackscale
critical.description: The Character was born with a sickly series of scaly rashes, discolored eyes, warped flesh, and other deformities. They have +1 Resilience due to it as well.

critical.name: Blessed Mark
critical.description: The Character has a blessed marking on their body of one of the Gods, this a great boon for their family or a horrifying revelation.

critical.name: Blood Fountain
critical.description: The Character’s hemophilia is truly a sight - they immediately go to Severe Bleeding and increase Bleed Damage by +2.

critical.name: Bloody Tears
critical.description: The Character’s body mixes blood into things it shouldn’t - tears, saliva, piss, and just about anything else has a sickly viscera coloration and conditions.

critical.name: Brain Fuzz
critical.description: The Character’s mind is wired “Wrong” - any psychic phenomenon or magic attempting to read the Character’s mind always returns the wrong answer or screams.

critical.name: Cancer
critical.description: The Character’s body is filled with cancerous tumors, they can delay the inevitable, but eventually their body will give out before long.

critical.name: Chimera
critical.description: The Character is a mixture of a variety of creatures and monsters, they are truly monstrous to behold, they roll 1d6+1 Times on the Major Mutation Chart.

critical.name: Devoured Twin
critical.description: The Character devours their twin in utero; they have two Auras that interlink and have +1 Learned Skill of their choice.

critical.name: Freakazoid
critical.description: The Character looks dramatically wrong, horribly wrong, they roll 1d12+2 times on the Minor Mutation Chart.

critical.name: Half-Life
critical.description: The Character is cursed with a half-life; their total life expectancy is half of what is normal for their species.

critical.name: Heartless
critical.description: Amazingly, the Character doesn’t have a heart, its functions split between different organs in the body. Though they also lack a heartbeat.

critical.name: Inner Rot
critical.description: The Character is rotting from the inside out; they have -3 Resilience.

critical.name: Melniboné Disease
critical.description: The Character’s body is weak, impairing a -2 to all Attributes and Defenses. If they take their Alchemical Medicines (250 Serpents per Dose) every week, this may be

critical.name: Mortian Teacup
critical.description: The Character is so fragile that it’s frightening to touch them. They have a Species Base HP of 0.

critical.name: Nyarlethotep’s Gift
critical.description: The Character rolls twice on Severe Mutations, but gains +1d when interacting with any Worshippers of Nyarlethotep or the Ny’var.

critical.name: Rapid Regeneration
critical.description: The Character has a Regeneration of 10, allowing them to regrow limbs and other parts of their body. They consistently regrow “Wrong.”

critical.name: Soul Sight
critical.description: The Character’s eyes are useless, being functionally blind, they do have Aura Sight instead. An inky darkness illuminated by the outlines of other auras.

critical.name: Soulless
critical.description: The Character was born without a soul, a tricky mutation due to it being explicitly magical in nature. They cannot cast magic and produce no aura.

critical.name: Terrakan Twins
critical.description: The Character has a conjoined twin attached, appearing to be two bodies fused together. They have -2 Physique and Finesse but have two additional Learned Skills.

critical.name: The Herculean Ideal
critical.description: The Character is strong, fast, handsome, smart, and most importantly kind. They have +1 to any Attribute of their choice.

critical.name: The Tree of Limbs
critical.description: The Character has 1d6 Extra Arms and 1d6 Extra Legs - if this exceeds 8 total limbs, they have a -1 to Physique, Finesse, and Presence.

critical.name: Nothing?
critical.description: The Character is afflicted with no major ailments. It’s a miracle! [D6: 1-5 Nothing! / 6 Explode for 10d Damage to Adjacent Enemies Upon Death; Bypass Armor]

corrupted.name: Bad Blood
corrupted.description: The Character has bad blood, and any variety of medical treatments incur a -5d to attempt to cure. Blood transfusion is impossible both ways.

corrupted.name: Inner Rot
corrupted.description: The Character is rotting from the inside out; they have -3 Resilience.

corrupted.name: Toxic
corrupted.description: The Character is toxic, literally. If any part of them is consumed it will deliver a Fast 8D Toxicity [D6: 1-2 Cytotoxin / 3-4 Hemotoxin / 5-6 Neurotoxin] that forces the target to take 2d HP Damage every hour for 1d4 hours.

corrupted.name: Cancer
corrupted.description: The Character’s body is filled with cancerous tumors, they can delay the inevitable, but eventually their body will give out before long.

corrupted.name: Corrupted Constitution
corrupted.description: The Character’s body is wracked by disease and poisons; they have -1 Resistance and treat all diseases / poisons as starting one interval sooner.

corrupted.name: Serrated Teeth
corrupted.description: The Character has a row of serrated teeth for biting and tearing food, and has torn their tongue multiple times. [Unarmed / DMG 3 P / Crit 3 / No Hands / Melee / Unwieldy, Ripping]

corrupted.name: Iron Skin
corrupted.description: The Character has rock solid skin, they have -1 Finesse but a Natural Deflection of 25 on all body parts.

corrupted.name: Colorblind
corrupted.description: The Character is completely colorblind, all colors to them are various greys.

corrupted.name: Deathly Pale
corrupted.description: The Character has the pallor of a corpse regardless of their Species.

corrupted.name: Hunched Spine
corrupted.description: The Character’s spine has a natural curve, making them appear hunched over at all times.

corrupted.name: Scleral Coloration
corrupted.description: The Character’s Scleral Coloration is different from normal. White is normal for humans and humanoids.

corrupted.name: Skin Cloak
corrupted.description: The Character’s skin stretches unevenly and uncomfortably across their body, as if they are wearing another person’s skin entirely.

corrupted.name: Sulfurous Breath
corrupted.description: The Character’s breath has a sulfur smell, leaving others gagging if not adequately prepared.

corrupted.name: Terrible Stench
corrupted.description: The Character gives off a terrible odor, something about being unnatural and atrocious for their Species to be around.

corrupted.name: Veiny
corrupted.description: The Character has protruding veins of a strange color, difficult to view without bringing attention to it.

corrupted.name: Black Blood
corrupted.description: The Character’s blood is pitch black.

corrupted.name: Cadaver Patches
corrupted.description: The Character has patchy pieces of discolored skin on their body, as if it is dead skin.

corrupted.name: Elongated
corrupted.description: The Character’s limbs are 1d4+1 Inches longer than normal.

corrupted.name: Rat Vomiting
corrupted.description: A churning sensation in the gut occurs every 1d6 days, causing the Character to vomit out a singular black rat in addition to the contents of their stomach.

corrupted.name: Evil Eye
corrupted.description: The [D6: 1-3 Left / 4-6 Right] Eye is entirely black with the pupil being either Red, Orange, or Green. It twitches a lot.

corrupted.name: Goop Blood
corrupted.description: The Character’s blood, once out of their body, is goopy - similar in feeling and appearance to gelatin.

corrupted.name: Leathery Skin
corrupted.description: The Character’s skin is coarse and uncomfortable to touch.

corrupted.name: Mono Colored Eye
corrupted.description: The Character’s eyes are a single, uncomfortable, color with no visible pupils.

corrupted.name: Sharkteeth
corrupted.description: The Character’s teeth are constantly growing, leading to many being popped out on a regular basis only to be replaced soon after.

corrupted.name: Slimy
corrupted.description: The Character is slimy. Literally. Gross.

corrupted.name: Vestigial Horns
corrupted.description: The Character has 1d4 Vestigial Horns growing from their head, they may, or may not, be poking out as bone protrusions.

corrupted.name: Man of the Rack
corrupted.description: The Character appears as if they have been stretched by a torturer’s rack, leaving them elongated and adding 1d6 inches of height.

corrupted.name: Meaningless Senses
corrupted.description: The corruption has made both the Character’s sense of Taste and Smell useless, they automatically fail any Taste or Smell Test.

corrupted.name: Atrophy
corrupted.description: The Character’s [D10: 1-2 Right Arm / 3-4 Left Arm / 5-6 Right Leg / 7-8 Left Leg / 9- 10 Nethers] is completely useless and cannot be used.

corrupted.name: Ghoulish Appetite
corrupted.description: The Character can only eat raw flesh, anything else will be vomited out within the hour.

corrupted.name: Grotesque
corrupted.description: The Character is frankly hideous, absolutely ugly, atrociously ugly, children cry when they are seen and animals would rather flee than face you. -2d to all Social Interactions except [Intimidation].

corrupted.name: Night’s Eye
corrupted.description: The Character can see in the dark as well as they can see during the day, but being in bright light causes a -1d on all Checks unless eye protection is used.

corrupted.name: Devil’s Tail
corrupted.description: The Character has a forked tail that moves around in a rhythmic manner, they gain +1 Soul as their body becomes more acclimated to casting.

corrupted.name: Cursed Mark
corrupted.description: The Character has a cursed brand appear on their body, signifying their use and abuse of Corruption magic, it stings and itches constantly.

corrupted.name: Chimera
corrupted.description: The Character is a mixture of a variety of creatures and monsters, they are truly monstrous to behold, they roll 1d6+1 Times on the Major Mutation Chart.

corrupted.name: Freakazoid
corrupted.description: The Character looks dramatically wrong, horribly wrong, they roll 1d12+2 times on the Minor Mutation Chart.

corrupted.name: Heartless
corrupted.description: Amazingly, the Character doesn’t have a heart, its functions split between different organs in the body. Though they also lack a heartbeat.

corrupted.name: Skinless Hands
corrupted.description: The Character’s hands appear as if they’ve been stripped of flesh, leaving only the muscle and bone underneath.

corrupted.name: Skeletal Visage
corrupted.description: The Character’s face grows sunken and sullen, as if their skull has skin poorly fitted across it.

corrupted.name: Bipupilled Eyes
corrupted.description: The Character has two pupils in their eye, darting around. They gain +1d to all Sight Checks.

corrupted.name: The Hole
corrupted.description: The Character has a hole in their chest, able to be seen through and even reached through.

corrupted.name: Black Teeth
corrupted.description: The Character’s teeth are pitch black.

corrupted.name: Malnourished
corrupted.description: The Character appears malnourished and sickly no matter how much they eat; they have -1 Resilience but only need to eat half as much.

corrupted.name: Hand Pupil
corrupted.description: A hand with inverted sclera and pupil is on the Character’s [D6: 1-3 Left / 4-6 Right] palm. It opens when the Character wills it.

corrupted.name: Claws
corrupted.description: The Character has clawed appendages, imparting a -1d when using manual finger dexterity, but they have the [Mutant Claws] Weapon. [Unarmed / DMG 3 S or P / Crit 5 / One Hand / Melee / Unwieldy, Agile, Light]

corrupted.name: Toxic Blood
corrupted.description: When hit by natural or unarmed attacks, the Character deals 2 corruption damage to the attacker, 6 if it is a bite attack, but -1 Resilience.

corrupted.name: Wyrmtongue
corrupted.description: The Character’s tongue is forked and distinctive -ss can be heard at the end of sentences. Extremely untrustworthy.

corrupted.name: Evil’s Crown
corrupted.description: The Character has a black mark appear around their forehead, indicating their use of Corrupted Magic and its effects on their soul.

corrupted.name: Ragged
corrupted.description: The Character seems to age as if they were one age category higher but suffering no ill effects.

corrupted.name: Nothing
corrupted.description: The Character has avoided the consequences of their Dark Magic. For now. (D6: 1-4 Nothing At All / 5-6 Null) If the Character is a Null, they have no flame in their soul and are unable to use Magic of any variety, the Character gains 50% Spell Resistance as compensation.

xenochild.name: Critical Deviation
xenochild.description: The Character rolls 1d4 times on the Critical Mutation Chart

xenochild.name: Severe Deviation
xenochild.description: The Character rolls 1d4 times on the Severe Mutation Chart

xenochild.name: Minor Health Deviation
xenochild.description: The Character rolls 1d4 times on the Major Mutation Chart

xenochild.name: Major Health Deviation
xenochild.description: The Character rolls 1d6 times on the Major Mutation Chart

xenochild.name: Minor Aesthetic Deviation
xenochild.description: The Character rolls 1d4 times on the Minor Mutation Chart

xenochild.name: Major Aesthetic Deviation
xenochild.description: The Character rolls 1d6+2 times on the Minor Mutation Chart

xenochild.name: Nothing to Report
xenochild.description: The Character has no distinguishable problems due to the Xenochild process.
